elementary.title: A2 Reported speech / Indirect speech
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Khi chúng ta thuật lại lời nói hoặc ý nghĩ của một người khác, chúng ta sử dụng Reported speech (Câu gián tiếp). Chúng ta thường phải thay đổi thì của động từ và đại từ khi thời gian và người nói thay đổi.
🔄 Thay đổi thì (Tense changes)
Direct SpeechReported Speech
Present Simple (am/is/are)Past Simple (was/were)
Present Simple (V/V-s)Past Simple (V2/ed)
Present ContinuousPast Continuous
Future (will)would + V
cancould
⚠️ Say vs Tell
• Say something (to somebody): He said he was tired.
• Tell somebody something: He told me he was tired.
• Chúng ta có thể lược bỏ that sau các động từ tường thuật.

exercises.q: He ___ me that he didn't have enough money.
She said that she ___ late.
exercises.exp: Lùi thì từ Present sang Past

exercises.q: They ___ that there was a problem.
Victor said he ___ change the windows.
I ___ the doctor I didn't want any medicine.
She said she ___ in a factory.
They didn't ___ me anything.
He said, 'I am tired.' -> He said he ___ tired.
Who ___ you that they wouldn't come?
She said, 'I can swim.' -> She said she ___ swim.
He said, 'I don't like tea.' -> He said he ___ like tea.
They said, 'We are winning.' -> They said they ___ winning.
I told him that I ___ help him.
She ___ that she was hungry.
My mom ___ me to go to bed.
He said he ___ his keys.
They ___ us the flight was cancelled.
She said, 'I'm watching TV.' -> She said she ___ watching TV.
He said he ___ come to the party.
I ___ that I was sorry.
He said, 'I am happy.' -> He said he ___ happy.
She said, 'I don't know.' -> She said she ___ know.
They said, 'We will help.' -> They said they ___ help.
He told me, 'I can't come.' -> He told me he ___ come.
She said, 'I am working.' -> She said she ___ working.
They told us, 'We are late.' -> They told us they ___ late.
He said, 'I have a car.' -> He said he ___ a car.
She said, 'I will call you.' -> She said she ___ call me.
They said, 'We don't like it.' -> They said they ___ like it.
He told me, 'I am busy.' -> He told me he ___ busy.
She said, 'I can speak French.' -> She said she ___ speak French.
They said, 'We are leaving.' -> They said they ___ leaving.
He said, 'I will be there.' -> He said he ___ be there.
She told me, 'I don't have time.' -> She told me she ___ have time.
They said, 'It is raining.' -> They said it ___ raining.
He said, 'I want to go.' -> He said he ___ to go.
She said, 'I am tired.' -> She said she ___ tired.
They told us, 'We will arrive at 6.' -> They told us they ___ arrive at 6.
He said, 'I can't see you.' -> He said he ___ see me.
She said, 'I am hungry.' -> She said she ___ hungry.

reorder.words: He said he was tired
She told me she would help
They said they were winning
He told me he couldn't come
She said she didn't have time
They told us the flight was late
He said he would call me
She told me she was working
They said they had a problem
He said he wanted to go
She told me she was sorry
They said it was raining
He said he could speak English
She told us she was busy
They said they were leaving soon
He said he would be there
She told me she liked coffee
They said they didn't like it
He said he was hungry
She told me she had lost her keys

passage.text: Yesterday I met Sally. She {{1}} (say) she {{2}} (be) very busy. She {{3}} (tell) me that she {{4}} (work) on a new project. I {{5}} (ask) if she {{6}} (can) help me. She {{7}} (say) she {{8}} (will) try. She {{9}} (tell) me that her boss {{10}} (be) very strict.

My friend Peter called me. He {{1}} (say) he {{2}} (not/have) enough money. He {{3}} (tell) me that he {{4}} (lose) his wallet. He {{5}} (say) he {{6}} (be) at the station. I {{7}} (tell) him I {{8}} (will) come. He {{9}} (say) he {{10}} (can) wait for me.

The teacher {{1}} (say) that the exam {{2}} (be) easy. She {{3}} (tell) us that we {{4}} (need) to study. She {{5}} (say) she {{6}} (will) help us. She {{7}} (tell) the class that everyone {{8}} (can) pass. We {{9}} (say) we {{10}} (be) ready.

Jane {{1}} (say) she {{2}} (be) tired. She {{3}} (tell) me she {{4}} (not/want) to go out. She {{5}} (say) she {{6}} (have) a headache. I {{7}} (tell) her she {{8}} (should) rest. She {{9}} (say) she {{10}} (will) call me later.

They {{1}} (say) they {{2}} (be) late. They {{3}} (tell) us they {{4}} (be) in traffic. They {{5}} (say) they {{6}} (can) arrive in ten minutes. We {{7}} (tell) them we {{8}} (will) wait. They {{9}} (say) they {{10}} (be) sorry.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy thuật lại một cuộc trò chuyện thú vị giữa bạn và một người bạn thân về kế hoạch cho kỳ nghỉ hè sắp tới (bạn ấy đã nói gì, bạn đã trả lời ra sao và cả hai đã quyết định điều gì).
hint_words: wanted to go to the beach
writing_prompts.example: Last Sunday, I met my best friend and we talked about our summer plans. She said that she wanted to go to the beach in July because she needed a break. I told her that I would love to join her and we decided to book the flight tickets next week.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại lời nhắn của mẹ bạn vào sáng nay trước khi bà đi làm (mẹ đã dặn bạn làm gì, bà nói bà sẽ về lúc mấy giờ và bà có nhắc nhở điều gì quan trọng không).
writing_prompts.example: This morning, my mother left a message before she went to work. She told me to clean the house and water the plants while she was away. She said she would be back late and reminded me to lock the door carefully for safety.

writing_prompts.vi: Thuật lại lời khuyên của bác sĩ trong lần khám sức khỏe gần nhất của bạn (bác sĩ nói gì về tình trạng sức khỏe, khuyên bạn nên ăn uống hay tập luyện thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: I visited the doctor for a check-up last month. He said that I was generally healthy but I looked a bit tired. He told me to exercise more often and suggested that I should eat more vegetables and drink plenty of water every day.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại những gì giáo viên tiếng Anh đã nói với lớp bạn về bài kiểm tra sắp tới (thầy/cô nói bài kiểm tra sẽ khó hay dễ, dặn dò các bạn chuẩn bị những gì).
writing_prompts.example: Our English teacher said something about the upcoming exam yesterday. She told the class that the test would not be difficult if we studied hard and reviewed all the lessons. She said she would give us some tips and reminded us to bring pens and pencils.

writing_prompts.vi: Thuật lại lời phàn nàn của một người hàng xóm về tiếng ồn vào tối qua (họ đã nói gì, họ cảm thấy thế nào và bạn đã hứa với họ điều gì).
writing_prompts.example: My neighbor came over last night and complained about the noise. He said that my music was too loud and told me he couldn't sleep well. I said I was sorry for the trouble and promised him that I would turn it down immediately.

elementary.title: A2 Expressing purpose with ‘to’ and ‘for’
elementary.content:
📌 Cách dùng To + Infinitive
Chúng ta dùng to + infinitive để nói về mục đích của một hành động (tại sao chúng ta làm việc gì đó).
• I went to the shop to buy some milk.
• I'm on a diet to lose some weight.
📌 Cách dùng For + Noun
Chúng ta dùng for + danh từ để nói về mục đích hoặc lý do.
• Let's go for a walk.
• I need some money for a taxi.
⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng
• KHÔNG dùng for + V-ing để nói về mục đích cá nhân: ❌ I work hard for improving my English. → ✅ I work hard to improve my English.
• CÓ THỂ dùng for + V-ing để nói về chức năng của một đồ vật: This machine is used for cleaning cars (hoặc to clean).

exercises.q: I need my computer ___ send an important email.
Call your doctor ___ an appointment.
I'm on a diet ___ lose some weight.
I'm going to call the restaurant ___ book a table.
A thermometer is a tool ___ measuring the temperature.
exercises.exp: For + V-ing chỉ chức năng đồ vật

exercises.q: Do you have time ___ a cup of tea?
I need some money ___ a taxi.
I need some money ___ take a taxi.
This knife is used ___ cutting plastic.
Where can I go ___ buy the ingredients?
He went to the library ___ study.
We stopped at the cafe ___ a coffee.
I'm saving money ___ a new car.
She went to France ___ learn French.
This brush is ___ painting.
I went to the gym ___ exercise.
They came here ___ a meeting.
I use this app ___ learning English.
He works hard ___ support his family.
Let's go to the park ___ a run.
I went to the shop ___ (buy) some bread.
We went to the pub ___ a drink.
I need a pen ___ (write) a letter.
This bag is ___ carrying books.
She is studying hard ___ (pass) the exam.
I went to London ___ a holiday.
He uses a camera ___ (take) photos.
This is a tool ___ opening bottles.
I'm going out ___ a walk.
They went to the kitchen ___ (make) coffee.
I need some help ___ my homework.
She went to the market ___ (get) vegetables.
This box is ___ storing toys.
I called him ___ (ask) a question.
We are going to the beach ___ a swim.
He uses a map ___ (find) the way.
This room is ___ meetings.
I went home ___ (rest).
She needs a ladder ___ (reach) the shelf.
This soap is ___ washing hands.

reorder.words: I went to the shop to buy milk
Let's go to the park for a walk
I need a pen to write a letter
This tool is for opening bottles
She studied hard to pass the exam
I'm going out for a coffee
He uses a camera to take photos
We went to London for a holiday
This bag is for carrying books
I went home to rest
She needs money for a taxi
He went to the gym to exercise
This room is for meetings
I called him to ask a question
They went to the kitchen to make coffee
This soap is for washing hands
I'm saving money for a new car
She went to France to learn French
We stopped at the cafe for a drink
He works hard to support his family

passage.text: I decided to go to the city center {{1}} (buy) some gifts. I went to the department store {{2}} some clothes. Then, I stopped at a bookstore {{3}} (look) for a new novel. I needed a bag {{4}} carrying all my things. I also went to the bank {{5}} some cash. Later, I met a friend {{6}} lunch. We went to a quiet cafe {{7}} (talk). I used my phone {{8}} (check) the time. It was a great day {{9}} shopping. I went home early {{10}} (rest).

He uses his computer {{1}} (work) every day. He needs it {{2}} sending emails and {{3}} (create) reports. Sometimes, he goes to a coffee shop {{4}} a change of environment. He brings a notebook {{5}} (write) down ideas. He also has a special case {{6}} protecting his laptop. He works hard {{7}} (earn) money {{8}} his family. He saves some money {{9}} a vacation. He travels {{10}} (see) the world.

We are planning a trip {{1}} (visit) our grandparents. We need to pack our bags {{2}} the journey. I bought a map {{3}} (find) the way. We are going by car {{4}} comfort. We will stop at a gas station {{5}} fuel. My sister brought some snacks {{6}} (eat) on the way. We also have a camera {{7}} taking photos. We want {{8}} (spend) time together {{9}} the holidays. It is a good time {{10}} family.

She went to the kitchen {{1}} (make) breakfast. She needed a knife {{2}} cutting bread. She used a kettle {{3}} (boil) water {{4}} tea. She also looked {{5}} some jam in the fridge. She sat down {{6}} a quick meal. She had to leave early {{7}} (catch) the bus. She went to the station {{8}} her commute. She works {{9}} (help) people. She does it {{10}} a living.

They went to the gym {{1}} (exercise). They need a membership {{2}} the club. They use the machines {{3}} (get) fit. They also go there {{4}} social reasons. They have a bottle {{5}} water. They exercise {{6}} (improve) their health. They also have a trainer {{7}} guidance. It is important {{8}} (stay) active. They do it {{9}} fun and {{10}} health.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về lý do bạn đang học tiếng Anh (bạn học để làm gì, nó giúp ích gì cho công việc hay cuộc sống của bạn, và bạn sử dụng những công cụ nào để hỗ trợ việc học).
writing_prompts.example: I am studying English to get a better job in an international company and to communicate with foreigners more easily. It is very important for my future career. I often use mobile apps for practicing vocabulary and to watch English movies without subtitles.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những vật dụng bạn mang theo khi đi du lịch và mục đích của chúng (ví dụ: máy ảnh để chụp hình, bản đồ để tìm đường, v.v.).
writing_prompts.example: When I am traveling abroad, I always bring a camera to take beautiful photos of the scenery. I also carry a map for navigation to find the way to famous landmarks. Additionally, I need sunscreen for protection to avoid sunburn and a power bank for charging my phone.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn đi đến một cửa hàng hoặc trung tâm thương mại (bạn đến đó để mua gì, cho ai, và bạn đã tốn bao nhiêu thời gian để tìm món đồ đó).
writing_prompts.example: I went to the mall last weekend to buy a special gift for my mother's birthday. I searched for a beautiful dress to find the perfect one for her. I spent about two hours for shopping because I wanted to make her happy with my choice.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thói quen tập thể dục của bạn (bạn tập để làm gì, bạn thường tập ở đâu và tại sao việc đó lại quan trọng đối với bạn).
writing_prompts.example: I go to the gym every morning to stay fit and to improve my health. Exercising for thirty minutes is very important for me to reduce stress after work. I want to have a better body and to feel energetic throughout the whole day.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một món đồ công nghệ mà bạn yêu thích và các chức năng của nó (bạn dùng nó để làm gì trong công việc hoặc giải trí hàng ngày).
writing_prompts.example: My favorite gadget is my tablet because I can use it to work and for entertainment. I use it for reading e-books and to watch videos during my free time. It is also great for browsing the internet and to take notes during meetings to stay organized.

elementary.title: A2 Infinitives and gerunds: Verb patterns
elementary.content:
📌 Dùng Gerund (-ing)
• Làm chủ ngữ: Reading is fun.
• Sau giới từ: I'm tired of waiting.
• Sau một số động từ: avoid, enjoy, finish, hate, keep, like, love, don't mind, prefer, recommend, spend time, stop, suggest.
📌 Dùng To + Infinitive
• Sau tính từ: It's important to arrive early.
• Chỉ mục đích: I went to visit family.
• Sau từ để hỏi: I don't know what to eat.
• Sau một số động từ: ask, decide, forget, help, hope, learn, need, offer, plan, promise, remember, seem, try, want, would like.
📌 Infinitive không có 'to'
• Sau trợ động từ: do, does, did.
• Sau động từ khuyết thiếu: will, can, must, should, might, may.

exercises.q: She offered ___ me.
We've decided ___ soon.
exercises.opts: getting married,to get married,get married,to getting married

exercises.q: I stopped ___ football when I got married.
We should ___ very early in the morning.
I'm not very good at ___ sports.
You promised ___ the children to the cinema.
Have you finished ___ the house?
You should avoid ___ to strangers.
___ around the world has always been my dream.
I couldn't ___ you because I didn't have my phone.
I enjoy ___ in the rain.
It is easy ___ this exercise.
I want ___ to the party tonight.
He doesn't mind ___ late.
She is interested in ___ a new language.
We plan ___ a new car next year.
I hate ___ early on Sundays.
exercises.opts: get up,getting up,to getting up,got up

exercises.q: They suggested ___ to the beach.
You must ___ your homework now.
I forgot ___ the door.
I enjoy ___ (listen) to music.
She wants ___ (buy) a new dress.
We should ___ (go) home now.
___ (smoke) is bad for your health.
I'm tired of ___ (work) all day.
They decided ___ (stay) at home.
He promised ___ (call) me later.
I avoid ___ (eat) too much sugar.
Can you ___ (help) me with this?
It is important ___ (learn) English.
I finished ___ (read) the book.
She hopes ___ (see) you soon.
We must ___ (hurry) or we'll be late.
He is good at ___ (cook).
I don't know what ___ (do).
They like ___ (play) tennis.
She offered ___ (carry) my bag.
I would love ___ (visit) Paris.
He keeps ___ (talk) about his trip.
I need ___ (find) my keys.

reorder.words: I enjoy listening to music
She wants to buy a dress
We should go home now
Smoking is bad for health
I am tired of working
They decided to stay home
He promised to call me
I avoid eating too much sugar
Can you help me with this ?
It is important to learn English
I finished reading the book
She hopes to see you soon
We must hurry or be late
He is good at cooking
I don't know what to do
They like playing tennis
She offered to carry my bag
I would love to visit Paris
He keeps talking about his trip
I need to find my keys

passage.text: I really enjoy {{1}} (travel) to new places. Last year, I decided {{2}} (visit) Japan. I wanted {{3}} (see) the cherry blossoms. Before {{4}} (go), I had to learn how {{5}} (use) chopsticks. It wasn't easy {{6}} (learn) at first. I spent a lot of time {{7}} (practice) at home. My friends recommended {{8}} (visit) Kyoto. I promised {{9}} (send) them postcards. I will never forget {{10}} (see) the beautiful temples.

She hates {{1}} (get up) early in the morning. She prefers {{2}} (sleep) until 10 AM. However, she needs {{3}} (wake up) at 7 AM {{4}} (go) to work. She avoids {{5}} (drink) coffee before bed. She enjoys {{6}} (have) breakfast with her cat. She doesn't mind {{7}} (walk) to the station. She likes {{8}} (listen) to podcasts on the bus. She hopes {{9}} (finish) her work early. She plans {{10}} (meet) her friends for dinner.

Learning a new language is hard. You should {{1}} (practice) every day. You must {{2}} (listen) to native speakers. It is important {{3}} (not/be) afraid of making mistakes. I suggest {{4}} (watch) movies in English. You can {{5}} (try) {{6}} (read) simple books. Don't forget {{7}} (review) new words. I enjoy {{8}} (talk) to my teacher. She helps me {{9}} (improve) my pronunciation. I would love {{10}} (become) fluent one day.

We decided {{1}} (have) a party. We started {{2}} (invite) our friends. I offered {{3}} (cook) the food. My sister promised {{4}} (buy) the drinks. We should {{5}} (clean) the house first. I don't mind {{6}} (do) the dishes. We enjoy {{7}} (spend) time together. Everyone wants {{8}} (have) fun. We keep {{9}} (plan) more events. We love {{10}} (see) our friends happy.

He is interested in {{1}} (learn) photography. He bought a new camera {{2}} (take) photos. He avoids {{3}} (use) the automatic mode. He wants {{4}} (understand) how {{5}} (adjust) the light. He enjoys {{6}} (walk) in the park {{7}} (find) good subjects. He spends hours {{8}} (edit) his pictures. He hopes {{9}} (win) a competition. He continues {{10}} (improve) his skills.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về những sở thích của bạn (bạn thích làm gì vào thời gian rảnh, bạn bắt đầu sở thích đó từ khi nào và tại sao bạn lại yêu thích nó).
writing_prompts.example: I really enjoy reading books and spending time at the local library during my weekends. I started this hobby when I was a child because I loved stories. Recently, I have decided to learn how to play the guitar. I practice every day because it helps me to relax after working hard.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một ngày cuối tuần lý tưởng của bạn (bạn muốn đi đâu, làm gì và bạn dự định sẽ gặp gỡ những ai).
writing_prompts.example: My ideal weekend is when I can go hiking with my close friends in the mountains. We plan to wake up very early to avoid the heat and enjoy being in nature. We hope to see a beautiful sunrise from the top. After that, we would love to have a big lunch together.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một kỹ năng mới mà bạn muốn học (tại sao bạn muốn học nó, bạn dự định sẽ học như thế nào và nó sẽ giúp ích gì cho bạn).
writing_prompts.example: I really want to learn cooking because I love eating healthy food every day. I plan to join a professional cooking class next month to improve my skills. I need to buy some new kitchen tools first. I hope to cook delicious meals for my family and I enjoy trying new recipes.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về những điều bạn thường làm để giữ gìn sức khỏe (ví dụ: tập thể dục, ăn uống lành mạnh, ngủ đủ giấc).
writing_prompts.example: To stay healthy, I always avoid eating junk food and I prefer drinking water to sugary drinks. I really enjoy going for a run every morning in the park near my house. It is also important to sleep at least eight hours a night and I try to reduce stress by listening to music.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một kế hoạch quan trọng mà bạn đã thực hiện thành công (đó là kế hoạch gì, bạn đã chuẩn bị như thế nào và cảm giác của bạn khi hoàn thành nó).
writing_prompts.example: I planned to move to a new city last year for my new job. I needed to find a good apartment first, so I started looking for options online every day. I decided to hire a moving company to help me with my furniture. I felt very happy to finish everything on time.
